description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a decorative white fence and featuring a large, well-manicured lawn on two sides. The structure includes a covered porch area, a carport, and multiple rooms with visible interior furnishings such as beds, tables, and kitchen appliances. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. There is a paved driveway leading to the carport, a backyard patio area, and a small pool or hot tub in one corner of the yard. The roof is flat and extends over the porch and carport, giving the building a modern, streamlined appearance. The property is designed for residential use, with clear zones for outdoor recreation, parking, and living.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a covered porch, carport, and spacious fenced yard featuring a patio and small pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, carport, and expansive green lawn bordered by a decorative white fence.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard patio, carport, and a small pool or hot tub in the corner, with the lawn extending along the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the lawn, the rear of the house, and the arrangement of windows and doors along the side facade.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the backyard, patio area, pool, and the open layout of the living spaces visible through large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
